name: phomymo-electron
description: Desktop wrapper for Phomymo with WebUSB/WebSerial support

scripts.dist:rpm: npm run build:main && ELECTRON_CACHE=$PWD/.electron-cache ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=$PWD/.electron-builder-cache electron-builder --publish never --linux rpm
scripts.dist:deb: npm run build:main && ELECTRON_CACHE=$PWD/.electron-cache ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=$PWD/.electron-builder-cache electron-builder --publish never --linux deb
scripts.dist:appimage: npm run build:main && ELECTRON_CACHE=$PWD/.electron-cache ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=$PWD/.electron-builder-cache electron-builder --publish never --linux AppImage
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:main && ELECTRON_CACHE=$PWD/.electron-cache ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=$PWD/.electron-builder-cache electron-builder --publish never --linux
